reason: Eighteen initial candidates overlapped earlier V5 evaluation fixtures. Overlaps remain regression-only and are replaced here before any replacement thread replies or V3/V5.2 outputs are opened.

include: The parent is a self-contained sales-rep question or a deliberately testable live-action request.
The parent has at least one thread reply.
The parent timestamp does not occur in any pre-existing Ask Sales evaluation JSON fixture.
The question tests reusable policy, current-artifact boundaries, action ownership, relationship matching, compound decomposition, or safe omission.
The normalized question can be evaluated without personal contact details or an attachment.
excludeAfterThreadReview: No reply from Rich, Mike, Rudy, Raul, or Madeline resolves the question.
The authoritative reply is only an acknowledgment, a request for missing context, or another unresolved question.
The gold answer requires a private attachment, personal data, or a live value that cannot be safely retained.
The parent duplicates another selected decision without adding a distinct relationship, qualifier, or route test.
selectionRules.antiCherryPicking: Thread-based exclusions are applied before V3 or V5.2 outputs are generated. Model performance cannot be used to add, remove, or rewrite a case.

candidates.question: A reassigned American Founders applicant has no business or entrepreneurial story but wants to pay to be on TV. Should a DJ rep pass, reject, or transfer the applicant?
If an existing client upgrades to VIP on an approved six-month payment arrangement, how should the changed contract be handled?
If a rep is late joining a booked call, does the lead automatically enter the pass-off workflow, and who should handle access questions?
Should Built for More reps use the Next Level CEO script with the show name changed, or use a separate approved script?
A main ISTV prospect missed the Sunday cohort deadline because their banker was unavailable. Can the rep still close them on Monday?
Where should a rep find the current commission SOP and confirm the 11 or 12 percent commission rules?
Does the applicable package submit an episode to one Tier 1 platform or to all three listed platforms?
A DJ rep is assigned an American Founders applicant. Should the rep take, cancel, or transfer the call?
May a rep take payment and complete post-sale onboarding steps by telephone when a client cannot connect to Zoom?
A prospect missed the cohort payment deadline because the bank was closed. May the rep grant a Monday exception?
Is a nurse practitioner who directs addiction treatment at a correctional facility a fit for America's Best Doctors, or should another show be considered?
What should a late-shift rep do when two booked calls overlap, pass-off operations is offline, and no rep accepts the handoff?
What is the minimum reapplication period after a prospect misses the main ISTV deadline?
Does appearing on the show provide SAG eligibility or SAG acting credits?
Should a rep decide whether a prospect with an old sealed felony and disputed media coverage may attend Call 1?
May a rep personally greenlight a prospect with an old securities-fraud conviction, or where must the case be reviewed?
What should a rep do when a promising prospect has pending felony charges and the rep is unsure whether to proceed?
The current ISTV PDF loads and then its content disappears. Where should the rep report the issue?
How should a rep determine a lead's time zone before calling a 20 percent dial-list lead during business hours?
Does net 30 on a commission invoice guarantee payment exactly 30 days after submission, or can payment arrive sooner?
Where can a rep find the current best-practice example for a combined Call 2 and onboarding submission?
A VIP client paid a smaller amount through the Standard link and signed the Standard agreement. What is the approved correction process?
Can a main ISTV Call 2 be moved to the next cohort because the prospect works emergency overnight shifts, and may the prospect pitch a documentary series?
If payment links failed and a main ISTV prospect cannot reconnect before 11:59 PM, may the rep honor the same-day discount later?
If a dial-list phone number belongs to a family member who asks the rep to email the applicant, is that compliant and how should the rep proceed?
Is a 48.5 percent no-show rate currently normal for company leads, or unusually high?
What does it mean when a contacted lead texts HELP, and how should the rep record or handle it?
Is Kingdom Creators currently an active show?
Can an ISTV applicant be moved to Next Level CEO during the audition process, and what is the ISTV rep's role?
If a Call 1 prospect wants acting work and has no business or entrepreneurial story, should the rep end the call and send a rejection?
After Call 1 is rescheduled to the next day, should the rep send the day-before email and text reminders again?
A client is considering a refund and asks about deferred payments. Should the rep propose terms or route the request?
What is the current theme of the TV Show HQ offer?
What is the current expected time from filming to episode delivery for Mompreneurs?
A VIP client is confused immediately after onboarding and wants to speak with the onboarding owner. Where should the rep ask for help?
An applicant requests Spanish casting materials, but the assigned rep does not speak Spanish. What should the rep do?
